text.title: pyproject.toml as the Single Source of Configuration Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping repo shape signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Every leaf is a conclusion ref bound to a rule id.

conclusion.verdict: skip — exotic build or vendored mirror
migrate legacy files into [tool.*] tables; delete them

example.trace: python_modern=true → legacy_present=true → no-legacy-companions → migrate setup.cfg/.flake8/pytest.ini into [tool.*] then delete

text.example: Canonical traversal from root question through branches to a single conclusion.
